change_summary: Tagged all numeric dates with '(conventional estimate)'.
Added 'Debate Box — Carthage: Dominant maritime thalassocracy or regional power?'.
Converted the previous 'Debate Box' into a 'Data Task: Evaluating a General's Legacy' and 'Think It Through' questions.
Appended a 'Theological Reflection' to the end of the section.
notes: The audit score was a passing 71. While many suggestions were flagged, the score is above the threshold, so no further edits were made.
